nodes.name: Inbound Call Webhook
nodes.notes:
Africa's Talking / Twilio posts here when someone dials the virtual number.

AT: set Action URL in your AT Voice number to: YOUR_N8N_BASE/webhook/inbound-call
Twilio: set Voice URL (POST) to the same endpoint.

parameters.responseBody:
=<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Response>
  <Say voice="alice" language="sw-TZ">Karibu Pawa Bus. Subiri kidogo tunaelekeza simu yako kwa wakala wa AI.</Say>
  <Say voice="alice" language="en-US">Welcome to Pawa Bus. Please hold while we connect you to the AI booking agent.</Say>
</Response>

nodes.name: Respond — Hold Music (AT/Twilio XML)
nodes.notes: Return XML immediately so AT/Twilio doesn't time out while we trigger VAPI.

nodes.name: Log to call_requests
nodes.notes: Record the inbound call for audit and ticket subscription.

nodes.name: Trigger VAPI Outbound to Caller
nodes.notes:
VAPI calls the customer back immediately so they're connected to the AI agent.

Required n8n credentials (store as env vars):
  VAPI_PRIVATE_KEY      — from app.vapi.ai → Account
  VAPI_PHONE_NUMBER_ID  — from app.vapi.ai → Phone Numbers
  VAPI_ASSISTANT_ID     — from app.vapi.ai → Assistants
  SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY  — Supabase project settings → API

notes: 1. Africa's Talking: Dashboard → Voice → Phone Numbers → set Action URL = YOUR_N8N_BASE/webhook/inbound-call (POST)
Twilio alternative: Phone Numbers → Active Numbers → Voice → A call comes in → Webhook = same URL
3. config.js: set VIRTUAL_PHONE_NUMBER (the AT/Twilio number), VIRTUAL_PHONE_DISPLAY, SMS_PROVIDER
4. SMS tickets are sent by the VAPI assistant tools workflow (01_vapi_tools.json) via AT/Twilio credentials
